metrics.textSample: Study Analytics Revision Upload your first document to retain knowledge forever. Interactive Tutor Chat with your document and test your knowledge. Knowledge Graph Visualize how concepts connect across all your documents. Upload Document Drag & drop your PDF here to begin learning.

metrics.title: Tutor LearningAI
metrics.textSample: Study Analytics Revision Cognitive Analytics Visualizing your learning memory and retention over time. Total Concepts i 0 The number of unique academic concepts you have extracted and studied across all documents. Interactions i 0 The total number of messages and voice queries you have exchanged with the AI Tutor. Study Sessions i 3 Distinct study periods you have completed, tracking your cognitive load over time. Concept Mastery Levels No concept mastery data yet Study a document or discuss concepts with the tutor to populate this chart. Mastery Distribution i Shows how many concepts are full

metrics.textSample: Study Analytics Revision Cognitive Analytics Visualizing your learning memory and retention over time. Total Concepts i 0 The number of unique academic concepts you have extracted and studied across all documents. Interactions i 0 The total number of messages and voice queries you have exchanged with the AI Tutor. Study Sessions i 4 Distinct study periods you have completed, tracking your cognitive load over time. Concept Mastery Levels No concept mastery data yet Study a document or discuss concepts with the tutor to populate this chart. Mastery Distribution i Shows how many concepts are full
